alternatives.transcript: This is David Nguyen, born February 14, 1960. I have sharp chest pain and trouble breathing. I am not sure what to do. My insurance is Blue Cross PPO and my phone number is 415-555-0199.

utterances.transcript: This is David Nguyen, born February 14, 1960. I have sharp chest pain and trouble breathing.
I am not sure what to do. My insurance is Blue Cross PPO and my phone number is 415-555-0199.
